2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX
26 - 28 Jun 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 33
Date 27 June 2026
Time 18:14
Title Infringement - Qualifying Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow
Description Infringement - Qualifying Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow
Enclosed AUT DOC 33 - Qualifying Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow Flags.pdf
Felix Holter Loïc Bacquelaine
Pedro Lamy Wilhelm Singer

 
 
 
 
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 
26 – 28 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 33 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  27 June 2026 
 
        Time  18:14 
  
 
The lap times set by the F1 cars that went through the double waved yellow flag marshalling sector will be deleted as 
detailed in Article B1.8.4b of the FIA F1 Regulations: 
 
Session Qualifying 
  
Fact The F1 cars passed through a double waved yellow flag marshalling sector. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 9 6  Isack Hadjar Oracle Red Bull Racing 17:00:45 PIT 
2 9 44  Lewis Hamilton Scuderia Ferrari HP 17:00:56 PIT 
3 9 30 Liam Lawson Visa Cash App Racing Bulls F1 Team 17:01:04 PIT 
4 9 16 Charles Leclerc Scuderia Ferrari HP 17:01:15 PIT 
5 9 1 Lando Norris McLaren Maste
